Reference

ESG dictionaries and vocabularies

Build and validate project-specific controlled vocabularies.

esgdict() esgdict_set_default() esgdict_get_default()

ESG Project Dictionary

esgdict_option()

Discover Valid ESG Dictionary Options

esgdict_check()

Check ESG Dictionary Parameter Values

ESGF queries and results

Query ESGF search services and work with returned result objects.

esg_query()

Query CMIP6 data using ESGF search RESTful API

esg_result()

Create empty query result object

`[`(<EsgResult>)

Subset an ESGF query result

data_node_status()

Get status of ESGF data nodes

solr_date()

Parse a Solr date, Date Math expression, or range

is.solr_date()

Check whether an object is a parsed Solr date

Climate data access and storage

Open remote datasets, manage local stores, and run persistent downloads.

EsgDataset

Remote NetCDF Dataset Access via OPeNDAP

EsgStore

Local ESGF Store

Downloader

General Purpose File Downloader

EPW morphing and backends

Configure store-native EPW morphing, recipes, and statistical downscaling backends.

EpwMorpher

Store-native EPW morpher

EpwMorphBackend

EPW morphing backend

epw_morpher()

Create an EPW morpher

epw_morph_periods()

EPW morphing periods

epw_morph_recipe()

EPW morphing recipe

epw_morph_variables()

EPW morphing variable sets

epw_morph_backends()

EPW morphing backends

epw_morph_backend()

Get an EPW morphing backend

epw_morph_register_backend()

Register an EPW morphing backend

epw_morph_result()

Create an EPW morphing backend result

Store-native shift workflow

Run the high-level staged workflow from request collection to future EPW output.

shift_request() shift_site() shift_reference_plan() shift_reference_historical() shift_collect() shift_download() shift_extract() shift_morph() shift_epw() shift_check() shift_refresh() shift_ids() shift_datasets() shift_files() shift_data() shift_diagnostics() shift_store() shift_target() shift_coverage() shift_outputs() shift_artifacts() shift_status()

Store-native shift workflow API

Command line and package options

epwshiftr_cli()

Run the epwshiftr command line interface

install_cli()

Install the epwshiftr command launcher

uninstall_cli()

Uninstall the epwshiftr command launcher

epwshiftr epwshiftr-package

epwshiftr: Create future EnergyPlus Weather files using CMIP6 data

store_dir()

Get the epwshiftr store directory
